PRESS RELEASE ###### SNC Signs Charter with Northrop Grumman and General Atomics Aeronautical Systems to Deliver Freedom Trainer™ for UJTS SNC, a global leader in aerospace and national security, today announced it signed an Executive Charter with Northrop Grumman (NYSE: NOC) and General Atomics Aeronautical Systems, Inc.
(GA-ASI) to define and execute production and manufacturing teaming relationships for its Freedom Trainer™. This strategic collaboration would combine SNC’s clean-sheet design with the expertise of Northrop Grumman and GA-ASI, to deliver a zero-compromise training solution for the U.S. Navy’s Undergraduate Jet Training System (UJTS) program. Read Now

# Digital RF Innovations
SNC’s Digital Radio Frequency (RF) solutions deliver _digital-first_ solutions to effectively analyze and dominate the electromagnetic (EM) spectrum. Using long-range sensing and seamless communication, we detect, locate and defeat threats while ensuring uninterrupted command and control in the electronic battlespace.

[Spec Sheets](https://www.sncorp.com/capabilities/digital-rf "Spec Sheets")

## Digital RF Features & Benefits

SNC's Digital RF capability delivers high-tech, multi-domain solutions to detect, track, and defeat threats across the electronic spectrum.

**Tactical Edge Processing**  
with a cloud infrastructure to digitize the RF

**Open Architecture**  
enabled for seamless integration with third-party apps

**Adaptive Environment**  
with SW-defined radios paired with smart antennas

**SNC TRAX® Software**  
integrated for rapid sensor-to-decision maker comms

**AI/ML**  
with algorithms to digitize RF emissions

**Mission Tailorable Suite**
of SNC applications tailored to mission needs

[](https://vimeo.com/991804979 "Digital RF Architecture")

## Digital RF Architecture

##### **Control the Spectrum**

SNC’s Digital RF capabilities play a crucial role, providing our nation with valuable insights into the capabilities, actions and intentions of our foreign adversaries. Our Digital RF capabilities analyze, intercept and defeat signals across a variety of sources including radio frequencies, satellites and additional communication channels.

## Multi-Domain EM Solutions Worldwide

We deliver disruptive technology to reimagine electronic spectrum warfare, enhancing at the pace of relevance. Key attributes include SIGINT-as-a-service, signals and electronic warfare (EW) monitoring, agile communications and electronic spectrum monitoring, assessment and engagement.

\+ Years Digitizing RF

K+ Systems Delivered & Deployed

\+ US & International Platforms

results.title: Digital RF - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts:
* Home
* Capabilities
* Digital RF

# Digital RF

SNC’s Digital Radio Frequency (RF) solutions deliver _digital-first_ solutions to effectively analyze and dominate the electromagnetic (EM) spectrum. Using long-range sensing and seamless communication, we detect, locate and defeat threats while ensuring uninterrupted command and control in the electronic battlespace.

## 4K+ Systems Delivered & Deployed

As one of the largest Digital RF solution providers in the industry, including ELINT and ESM systems, SNC offers six decades of experience designing, developing and delivering more than 4,000 systems for U.S. Department of Defense, military and partner nations worldwide.

_SNC’s multi-function, interoperable solutions are re-engineering combat through connected battlefields that rapidly link sensor to shooter._

## Designed for Multi-Domain Operations (MDO)
Certified to both commercial and military standards, our sensor and mission systems are recognized worldwide for their scalability, capability and versatility. Designed for multi-domain operations (MDO), our systems support airborne, ground and dismounted platforms and are ready to detect and protect against a range of current and next-generation signal threats.

SNC’s Digital RF solutions allow the warfighter to explore and build successful mission operations across the electromagnetic spectrum with AI-enabled technologies, converged RF solutions and advanced systems investigation request (SIR) IT systems.

## Get in Touch with a Business Area Expert

Our tightly-knit business areas are recognized as industry leaders and work to deliver of a suite of capabilities that meet the most challenging client requirements.

Contact Us

### All-Domain Learn More

Let us know how we can help optimize your operations with our innovative, modular, mission-tailored aircraft system design, modification & support solutions.

results.title: Sierra Nevada Corporation Successfully Completes the Acquisition of Orbital Technologies Corporation of Wisconsin - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts:
* Home
* News Archive
* Sierra Nevada Corporation Successfully Completes the Acquisition of Orbital Technologies Corporation of Wisconsin

## PRESS RELEASE

# Sierra Nevada Corporation Successfully Completes the Acquisition of Orbital Technologies Corporation of Wisconsin

**Sparks, Nev.,** **July 10, 2014 –**

Sierra Nevada Corporation (SNC) announces it completed the acquisition of [Orbital Technologies Corporation (ORBITEC)](http://www.orbitec.com/) , headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin. The company will continue its operations in Madison, while supporting SNC's Space Systems in Louisville, Colorado.

The acquisition comes as the result of the previous successful working relationship between the two firms. The combined capabilities and products of SNC's Space Systems and ORBITEC provide SNC's customers with a comprehensive set of green space propulsion technology options with both hybrid solid/liquid and bipropellant liquid rocket motors.
SNC Space Systems provides world class components and subsystems to space contractors, including gimbal mechanisms, power subsystems, solar array drives, release mechanisms, integrated solar panel assemblies and flight control actuators.

"We're pleased to formally welcome ORBITEC to the SNC family," said [SNC President Eren Ozmen](http://www.sncorp.com/who-we-are/eren-ozmen.html) . "It was a natural progression for our two companies to come together after years of teaming on SNC's _Dream Chaser_ ® spacecraft program. Our complementary technologies, depth in space systems leadership and steadfast commitment to developing safe, human spaceflight, are consistent with both our business plans for significantly growing our aerospace and commercial markets.”
As previously announced by SNC, the ORBITEC acquisition extends SNC's subsystems portfolio to include Environmental Control Life Support Subsystems (ECLSS) and advanced thermal management for human spaceflight vehicles and orbiting habitats. The excellent performance characteristics and value of ORBITEC's ECLSS and Reaction Control Subsystem (RCS) technology made these the clear choice for SNC's Dream Chaser winged Commercial Crew Transport for the International Space Station. SNC is committed to continuing ORBITEC's excellent relationships with its government and commercial customers.

ORBITEC's decades of experience in strong liquid rocket propulsion systems, human spaceflight life support and thermal systems, automated life science systems, and fire suppression systems portfolio will provide substantial enhancements to SNC's Space Systems' broad product line,” said [Mark N. Sirangelo](http://www.sncorp.com/who-we-are/mark-sirangelo.

results.title: 60th Anniversary - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts: 2005 SNC establishes an office in Centennial, Colorado, and acquires Straight Flight, creating what is now the IAS business area. This allows SNC to expand its offerings to include aircraft modification.

results.title: Company Overview - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts:
* Home
* Company

# Company

SNC is a global leader in aerospace and national security committed to moving the American Dream forward. Known and respected for our mission and execution focus, agility, and disruptive and rapid innovation, we provide leading edge technologies and transformative solutions to support our nation's most critical security needs.

SNC's diverse and passionate teams of engineers and dedicated professionals safeguard our freedom and inspire the next generation to make a lasting impact on humanity through technology and imagination.

About SNC

## Leading the Way

SNC's commitment to inquisitive leadership means helping to develop an enterprise-wide mindset of advancement. Our leadership believes a dynamic team environment leads to innovative advancements in technologies, business practices and most importantly to the personal development of our employees.

Meet Our Leadership Team

[](https://vimeo.com/738437694 "A History Of Success")

## A History Of Success
Through our commitment to performance and teaming with like-minded companies interested in discovery and innovation, we have grown a company dedicated to success and complete customer satisfaction.

## Business Areas

Our tightly-knit business areas are recognized as industry leaders and work together to deliver a suite of capabilities that meet the most challenging client requirements.

### ISR, Aviation  
& Security (IAS)

A leading prime manned and unmanned aircraft systems integrator for innovative high-performance ISR systems, aircraft modification, and cybersecurity, specializing in complete end-to-end design, modification, integration, test and certification.

### Mission Solutions  
& Technologies (MST)

Bringing together technology and world-class integration services to provide affordable, high-impact solutions in the areas of C4ISR, customizable multi-mission solutions, electronic warfare, cyber, navigation and landing systems, key management systems and big data management.
Business Areas

## Mission, Vision & Values

It’s our mission to deliver innovative, open architecture technology solutions that support and protect our customers, wherever their missions take them — air, land, sea, cyber and space.

Mission, Vision & Values

## Our Commitment to Quality

Sierra Nevada Company is committed to meet our customers’ expectations by delivering value using efficient, defined processes, and the continuous improvement of these processes, that translates requirements into cost-effective products and services delivered on time and with the quality required by our customers.

## Social Impact

Our mission and pay-it-forward culture are strengthened by the efforts of the Ozmen Foundation, corporate donations and employee volunteerism to drive innovation, fuel entrepreneurship and make a difference in our local, national and global communities.

Our Impact

## Awards & Recognition

results.title: Recruitment Fraud - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts: We advise all interested applicants to apply for a job directly from the sncorp.com/careers site to avoid fraudulent job ads. SNC's email domain is @sncorp.com.
